name: Abel
oracleText:
When Abel enters the battlefield, create a Food token.
Whenever you sacrifice a token, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.
Whenever another nontoken creature you control dies, you gain 2 life.
flavorText: "And Abel, he also brought of the firstlings of his flock and of the fat thereof." — Genesis 4:4
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme reuses the existing Early World Cain and Abel old-master artwork so Abel shares the same foundational scene.
title: Keeper of the First Flock
